pull_request.title: Bump rack from 2.2.8 to 2.2.10
pull_request.body:
Bumps [rack](https://github.com/rack/rack) from 2.2.8 to 2.2.10.
Changelog

Sourced from rack's changelog.

[2.2.10] - 2024-10-14

Security


[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=rack&package-manager=bundler&previous-version=2.2.8&new-version=2.2.10)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself.
